text.aboutme: I am a developer passionate about innovation and software engineering. I specialize in building scalable and efficient solutions, making strategic technical decisions. I foster effective collaboration and bring experience in agile methodologies.
text.aboutme.tittle: I'm a FullStack Developer with +4 years of experience
text.aboutme.description: Hi, I'm Edgar Lagos. Since starting in 2022, I have professionally evolved by mastering the modern JavaScript ecosystem and Full Stack architectures. My background in graphic design allows me to have a comprehensive vision of the product. Today, I focus on delivering clean, optimized, and high-performance code, working with agile methodologies to solve complex business problems.
text.services.description: During this period, I have been exploring a variety of different technologies. Below, I will introduce you to some of them.
skills.title: Technologies I Master
skills.subtitle: My Tech Stack
skills.description: A set of tools and methodologies that allow me to create complete and efficient digital solutions.
skill.ai.title: Vibe Coding & AI Ops
skill.ai.desc: Advanced Prompt Engineering, API implementation (OpenAI, Gemini), workflow automation (n8n, Zapier), and custom Agents/Chatbots creation.
skill.frontend.title: Frontend Development & Frameworks
skill.frontend.desc: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, React, Next.js, Redux, Material UI, Tailwind CSS.
skill.wordpress.title: WordPress Ecosystem
skill.wordpress.desc: Expert development with Elementor, performance optimization, and site customization for specific sectors (Restaurant/Retail).
skill.backend.title: Backend & Databases
skill.pos.title: Systems & POS
skill.pos.desc: Integration of Point of Sale (POS) systems and communication protocols for commercial management applications.
skill.tools.title: Environment Tools
skill.tools.desc: Git, Docker, Agile methodologies (Scrum), Pair Programming.
skill.lang.title: Languages
skill.lang.desc: Spanish (Native), English (A2 - actively improving for technical documentation).
text.work.description: My projects are of great importance to me, so I always dedicate my maximum effort to ensure they are left in the best possible condition. To achieve this, I spare no time or resources.
